identity.fantasy: A tiny ninja cat who wins by closing and resetting distance faster than opponents can re-establish spacing, using a swift ninja dash.
silhouette: Sleek black ninja hood that reveals pointed cat ears
Lightweight dark blue and purple shinobi tunic
Thin upright cat tail that peeks out from the back

primary.name: Ninja Kunai Stance
primary.counterplay: Sasu must be close to threaten, so hold a spacing just outside her advance step and punish the open recovery pose when she commits and whiffs.
primary.interruption: If interrupted before frame 3, no weapon event spawns and the action is cancelled.

ability.name: Shadow Dash
ability.description: Sasu drops low and dashes forward quickly.
ability.counterplay: Low Breach travels a straight line at a fixed low height with a visible crouch tell; jump over it or step off the line during the startup, then punish the extended recovery.
ability.interruption: If interrupted before frame 4, no push is applied, no forward drive occurs, and the cooldown is not spent.

weaknesses: Very low body weight makes Sasu travel much further per hit than average, so she loses stocks near the arena edge far earlier than heavier fighters.
Low Breach commits to a straight line and cannot be steered after frame 4, so a whiffed breach leaves a long punishable recovery.

artBrief.spriteSheet: One right-facing body-only sheet per state, 256x256 cells, row-major frame order, transparent runtime PNG, feet-center pivot.
artBrief.windUpCue: For Shadow Dash, Sasu drops hips low and tucks arms in, cat ears folding back slightly.
artBrief.impactCue: Body remains compact during the forward drive. No integrated hit effects.
artBrief.recoveryCue: Sasu skids to a halt, one hand on the ground, before returning to idle stance.
avoid: Named franchise characters, assets, logos, terminology, or move lists
Weapon, muzzle flash, projectile, impact, trail, or dust baked into body sheets
Unreadable details or asymmetry that breaks horizontal mirroring
Insignia, rank patches, unit numbers, flags, or any readable text on the uniform

stateTransitions: idle|walk -> jump_start -> rise -> fall -> land -> idle
implementationNotes.notes: Simulation owns dash trajectory and hit evaluation. Sasu is a small ninja cat; body sheets remain weapon-free.
